title: 日本ダービーの後に・二冠めっ！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having just crushed the Japanese Derby, Tokai
Teio thrusts two fingers up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The only Classic race left is the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio is completely energized. The Triple
Crown champion title is just within her reach.
